build.buildCommand: rm -f bootstrap/cache/*.php && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-scripts && php artisan package:discover --ansi && npm install && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && php artisan storage:link && php -S 0.0.0.0:$PORT -t public
